calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Mar-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PCN-18-302202 Conservatorship of Richard Paturel and
PTR-20-303919 The Richard Paturel Revocable Trust.

Appearances: Kelly Dixon appeared by zoom for and with Daniel Cunningham (conservator/trustee) by zoom.

With respect to the IRA, Mrs. Dixon stated that the Administrator at the VA is in communication with Wells Fargo, that they are getting the paper together to make distribution to the beneficiary and that at this point, there isn't anything else that Mr. Cunningham can do. Mrs. Dixon also stated that the trust provides for accountings to the court, that ongoing court supervision of the trust is not required, that they are trying to minimize costs to the charities, and that there is an error in the order regarding paragraph 9 subparagraph c with respect to the Fed Ex assets as they are not held in the Wells Fargo account. The Third and Final Account and Report of Conservator, etc., and the Second Account and Report of Trustee are under submission.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

Off Calendar Oct-18-2023 Continued To Dec-19-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Kelly Dixon, Esq., via Zoom, for Daniel Cunningham, Trustee.

At the court's query, Ms. Dixon advises that the Trust Accounting is ready to file and notes that the Accounting Petition in the related Conservatorship matter is set for Dec-19-2023 and requests that the court order the filing clerk to calendar the Trust Accounting on the same date to conserve judicial economy. The court agrees with counsel's request.

The subject matter is continued to Dec-19-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cabrera. Not Reported.

Kelly Dixon appeared by zoom as substituted attorney for Daniel Cunningham.

Off Calendar Jul-26-2023 Continued To Aug-23-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Daniel Cunningham (trustee) and Richard Thomas Franceschini (attorney) to appear on August 23, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Order to Show Cause ordered to Richard Thomas Franceschini (attorney) to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 pursuant to CCP 128 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Trust accounting #2 is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Franceschini appeared by zoom for and with Daniel Cunningham (trustee) by zoom.

The court raised the issue of the trustee owing $4,000.00 for overpaid fees. Mr. Franceschini stated that the trustee paid himself without court approval and then had additional fees incurred, and that the trustee may not owe anything at this point. Mr. Cunningham stated that he mistakenly paid himself, that he thought he had court approval to pay fees on account, but he only had approval in the conservatorship, and that he will deduct those fees/that amount in the conservatorship. The court informed Mr. Franceschini that he needs to show the bond calculation in future petitions, that the accountings should be synchronized together and that the next accounting period should be from September 1, 2021 through December 31, 2023. Mr. Franceschini stated that the conservatee has passed away and that they will do the accounting through the date of death. The Trustee's Second Amended Petition for Order Approving and Settling First Account, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to allow, but not approve the accounting as filed. Status on filing of the next accounting is set for July 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed Mr. Franceschini that the papers do not need to be served on the court investigator's unit.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

Appearances: Richard Franceschini, via ZOOM, for Daniel J. Cunningham, Petitioner.

Counsel reports that he failed to appear at the last calling of this matter due to a calendaring oversight. Counsel reports that Mr. Cunningham has been dealing with health issues but that the accounting should be completed by the end of next week.

The Order to Appear is taken off calendar. The Status on Filing of First Account is continued to Dec-29-2021 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.
